name: senna-alone
prompt: Wide shot. Red-haired woman standing alone in dim storage room. Scattered ice crystals on floor around her — remnants of broken earring. Ghost of warmth in the air that doesn't belong to her. Her hands trembling. Her power burning unchecked around her. Empty space. Lost. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

sfx.description: quiet empty room, fading warmth, distant ventilation hum
